title: vcenter/create-portgroup input
description: Input Contract for the vcenter/create-portgroup Action (ADR-0113 D4): create a DVS portgroup with an 802.1Q VLAN. vlanId (and optionally cidr) are bound from a prior netbox/ipam-resolve Workflow Step's outputs — an explicit, legible allocation Step, never resolve-inject. vCenter credentials inject at the plugin's own broker (§2.5).

datacenter.description: target datacenter; empty selects the sole datacenter

dvs.description: target distributed virtual switch; empty selects the sole DVS

vlanId.description: the 802.1Q VLAN id, bound from netbox/ipam-resolve outputs

cidr.description: the ipam-allocated prefix, carried for legibility (the Syncer OBSERVEs the authoritative net.subnet Facet)

projectKind.description: estate overlay (ADR-0058 §6): the Entity kind the built portgroup projects AS. Empty keeps the native 'subnet'.

projectLabels.description: estate overlay labels carried on the built portgroup's Run-provenance projection (§2.1 per-key ownership).
